title: AHZNB's Naruto Rinnegan
body:
This addon requires Naruto AHZNB's Mod v0.3.0, Seals Add-on v1.0+ and Jutsu Add-on v1.0+.

Rinnegan Tomoe

How to get it? 
- Consume White Zetsu Flesh while you have Mangekyo on.
What abilities does this dojutsu have?
1). Updated Amenotejikara (activation on sneaking teleports you behind the target; activation without sneaking swaps your position with the target's)
2). Susanoo
3). Amaterasu
4). Genjutsu
5). Chibaku Tensei 

All of the jutsu are bonded to keys, which you have ability to change in controls settings.

Feel free to join DecentStudio Discord server for any questions, to stay updated, or to order your own mod: https://discord.gg/MdFpAjPqpXContact me directly on Discord - @bybyzyanka
